summary: Cap compare-routes to 5 concurrent goroutines via semaphore.
reason: compare-routes spawned one goroutine per route with no concurrency cap. With many routes this would fire simultaneous API chains against the private AirHint API, causing rate limiting. Added a 5-slot buffered channel semaphore matching predict-sweep's existing cap.
validated_outcome: compare-routes with N routes runs at most 5 search+poll+predict chains concurrently.
